description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) in autonomy was stopped at a red light behind an SUV (Vehicle 2) in the right travel lane on southbound 11th 
Street at the intersection with Bryant and Division Streets in San Francisco. After the light turned green, the SUV proceeded straight, in the 
right lane, toward southbound Bryant Street. The Zoox vehicle also proceeded and transitioned into the left lane (also a through lane). While 
almost through the intersection, the SUV suddenly veered left across the path of the Zoox vehicle toward Division Street. The Zoox vehicle 
braked hard in response to the turning SUV and had almost reached a stop when the rear driver side of the SUV made contact with the 
passenger side front fender of the Zoox vehicle. The Zoox vehicle then came to a full stop. The driver of the SUV left the scene without 
exchanging information. The Zoox vehicle cleared the intersection, proceeded down Bryant Street, briefly stopped again, and then pulled 
over on Bryant Street. The Zoox vehicle sustained minor damage to the passenger side front fender. The police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
